allow: Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import {getDb} from './src/db.mjs'; const db=getDb\(\); console.log\('sessions:', JSON.stringify\(db.prepare\('SELECT session_id, project_path, merged_into, updated_at FROM sessions ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 5'\).all\(\), null, 2\)\); console.log\('skel count by session:', JSON.stringify\(db.prepare\('SELECT session_id, COUNT\(*\) c, COUNT\(DISTINCT origin_session_id\) origins FROM skeletons GROUP BY session_id ORDER BY c DESC LIMIT 5'\).all\(\), null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import {getDb} from './src/db.mjs'; const db=getDb\(\); const s=db.prepare\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) c FROM sessions'\).get\(\); const k=db.prepare\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) c FROM skeletons'\).get\(\); console.log\('sessions:', s.c, 'skeletons:', k.c\);")

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='\\''node.exe'\\''" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like '\\''*token-monitor*'\\'' } | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List')

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import {getDb} from './src/db.mjs'; const db=getDb\(\); const rows=db.prepare\('SELECT session_id, merged_into, created_at, updated_at FROM sessions ORDER BY updated_at DESC'\).all\(\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(rows,null,2\)\);")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import {getDb} from './src/db.mjs'; import {resolveMergeTarget} from './src/session-merger.mjs'; const db=getDb\(\); const r=db.prepare\('SELECT session_id, merged_into FROM sessions ORDER BY updated_at DESC'\).all\(\); console.log\('total:', r.length\); console.log\('unmerged:', r.filter\(x=>x.merged_into===null\).length\); const t=db.prepare\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) c FROM skeletons WHERE session_id=?'\).get\('7c57fdfd-17fe-4ef9-b9f8-a32be3c01f16'\).c; console.log\('7c57 skeletons:', t\); console.log\('resolve 2ed5 ->', resolveMergeTarget\(db, '2ed5039c-0093-45cb-8326-17af07780c13'\).target\);")
